title: Rubik's Craft UHC Data Pack
description:
A UHC Data Pack like no other. 
Includes tonnes of different customisations for your UHC!
body:
# Rubik's Craft UHC Data Pack



**Rubik's Craft UHC Data Pack** allows you to experience UHC's like no other!
Customise your UHC in new and interesting ways, including effects, gamemodes, and utilities!

## Features

 ### Unique Gamemodes
*All our gamemodes are stackable so you can have all or none of the extra effects enabled.*
- **Max Hearts** - Players start with 512 hearts.
- **Moon Mode** - Jump boost and slow falling.
- **A Matter of Loaf or Death** - Gain half a heart per loaf of bread consumed.
- **Zombified** - When players die, they'll be put into a new Zombie team!
- **Vampire Mode** - Players without blocks above their heads, need helmets. (The light, it burns!)
##### ... And many more!

### User Interface
*No more confusing code, all our UHC functions are controlled in-game.*
- **Book Selections** - Customise your UHC how you want it, with easy to use toggles in-game using  written books.
- **Share Your Selections** - Send your selections to the in-game chat so all players can see what's on, and what's not!
- **Scoreboard Info** - World border size and other key information displayed in the sidebar.
- **Useful Messages** - Day/Night messages and toggleable Minute Markers!
- **Easy Team Configuration** - Players can select their own teams, or go random, decided by the admin!

## Set Up
Set up is extremely easy! Drag, drop and play!
<details>
<summary>Installation Guide</summary>

How to Install:
1. Create a Minecraft world.
2. Add in the Data Pack.
3. Join the world and run /reload.
4. In the books given to you, under "Main Controls", select "Set Up".
5. Customise the UHC using the other books, and select "start" when done.

NOTE: In some versions, you may need to use /function minecraft:install to receive the books.
</details>

## Version Control
We use the following version control system:
- **+1.0.0** - For each new GUI reconfiguration.
- **+0.1.0** - For each new gamemode/customisation.
- **+0.0.1** - For each new fix/tweak update of an existing gamemode/customisation.

*We will only ever update the latest version of this data pack with changes. Therefore, we can only look at bugs/issues that currently effect the latest version of this project.*

## Credits
Based on the original creation by Rover1.
All uploaded versions are substantially modified from the original.
Thanks to Sharbelao for the bug fixing 1.21+.
Thanks to mbr_2020 for Discord support.
